/usr/bin/ar qc libSunny.Infrastructure.a CMakeFiles/Sunny.Infrastructure.dir/Application/INOR001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Infrastructure.dir/Bridge/INBR001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Infrastructure.dir/Format/FMAB001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Infrastructure.dir/Format/FMLY001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Infrastructure.dir/Format/FMMI001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Infrastructure.dir/Format/FMMX001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Infrastructure.dir/Format/FMSL001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Infrastructure.dir/Protocol/WPOSC001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Infrastructure.dir/Session/INSM001A.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sunny.Infrastructure.dir/Transport/INTP001A.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libSunny.Infrastructure.a
